course.title: Programming Fundamentals
course.concepts: Variables, Data Types, Control Statements, Functions, Arrays, Pointers

course.title: Data Structures
course.concepts: Arrays, Linked Lists, Stack, Queue, Trees, Graphs, Sorting

course.title: Database Management Systems
course.concepts: ER Model, SQL, Normalization, Transactions, Indexing

course.title: Operating Systems
course.concepts: Processes, Threads, CPU Scheduling, Deadlocks, Memory Management

course.title: Computer Networks
course.concepts: OSI Model, TCP/IP, IP Addressing, Routing, HTTP, DNS

course.title: Artificial Intelligence
course.concepts: Machine Learning, Neural Networks, NLP, Computer Vision, Search Algorithms
